DPmixGPD

DPmixGPD fits Dirichlet process mixture models (CRP or stick-breaking backends) with an optional Generalized Pareto (GPD) tail, enabling unified modeling of bulk distributions and extreme values with clean, user-friendly prediction APIs.

Installation 

# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("arnabaich96/DPmixGPD")

Documentation

Manual

Comprehensive user documentation:

  • Manual Overview - Complete guide to using DPmixGPD
  • Introduction - Quick start guide with basic examples
  • Available Distributions - Overview of supported mixture kernels
  • Model Specification - How to specify models and priors
  • MCMC Workflow - Running and diagnosing MCMC chains
  • Unconditional Models - Density estimation without covariates
  • Conditional Models - Covariate-dependent density estimation
  • Causal Inference - Treatment effect estimation with propensity scores
  • Backends (CRP vs SB) - Comparing inference approaches
  • S3 Methods Reference - Using print, summary, plot, predict, etc.

Kernels

  • Kernels Overview - Guide to available mixture kernels
  • Amoroso | Cauchy | Gamma | Inverse Gaussian | Laplace | Lognormal | Normal

Workflows & Case Studies

  • Workflows & Case Studies - Extended tutorials and case studies

Reference

  • Function Reference - Complete API documentation ### Coverage
